generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLidar : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoUST10LXLidarPointcloudData
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i Depth Camera for depth perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelD435iDepthData
]

instance SpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLidarPointcloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLidar
]

instance IntelD435iDepthData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance PointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoUST10LXLidarPointcloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANPointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance DepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth perception data from Intel D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelD435iDepthData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance DBSCANPointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANPointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance DBSCANPointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN point cloud clustering enabler"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ClusteredPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered point cloud data after DBSCAN processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoUST10LXLidarPointcloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter object tracking enabler"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object track data after Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoUST10LXLidarPointcloudData, IntelD435iDepthData, VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance ISO15622ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control model enabler"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ACCControlCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "ACC control command for speed and steering"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for vehicle state and object track storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring service for real-time visualization and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTrackingReports, PerformanceAnalytics
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading service for ACC system execution on Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlCommand
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management service for UI-based control of ACC functions"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlCommand
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state for driver information"
]

instance ObjectTrackingReports : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Object tracking reports for driver information"
]

instance PerformanceAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance analytics for driver information"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor speed control"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for directional control"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 node entity for Physical Twin"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 node entity for Digital Twin"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 node entity for User Interface"
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 node entity for Cross-System communication"
]

instance ROS2Environment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware environment for digital twin nodes"
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, CrossSystemEntity
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for development"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-node communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 scripting environment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for performance-critical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance TraxxasSlash4x4Vehicle : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle based on Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX microcomputer for processing"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for processing"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin environment for vehicle components"
    base:contains TraxxasSlash4x4Vehicle, NVIDIAJetsonNX, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, HokuyoUST10LXLidar, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo
]

instance ISO23247ReferenceArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for digital twin development"
]

instance CaseBasedGeneralization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Case-based generalization for requirements definition"
]

instance ROS2PackagesImplementation : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Implementation using ROS2 packages"
]

instance PublicArtifacts : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Artifacts publicly available for reuse"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals for ACC commands (enable/disable, desired speed, emergency braking) transmitted from DT to PT, converting to motor voltage commands and steering adjustments via actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms as per requirements R7 and R8."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (on vehicle hardware), Digital Twin Entity (cloud/hosted), User Entity (remote UI), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation), communicating via ROS2 intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during design (development phase for ADAS systems) and operation (real-time monitoring and control of ACC during vehicle operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Adherence to ISO 15622 for ACC control strategy, meeting latency (≤100 ms) and clock sync (100 ms) requirements for safety-critical operations; specific V&V methods not detailed beyond requirements compliance."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-entity communication within the vehicle, Wi-Fi network for inter-entity communication; Data Translation FE implements serialization and protocol conversion (potentially OPC UA as per ISO 23247 standard)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on NVIDIA Jetson hardware onboard the vehicle; Digital Twin Entity components deployed on cloud infrastructure; User Entity hosted on remote client devices for UI access."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework reference architecture applied to automotive systems; ACC implementation follows ISO 15622."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety considerations enforced via strict latency and synchronization requirements; cybersecurity measures not explicitly detailed in the document."
]
